description: Letter from Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108) to his son Abū l-Ḥasan ʿEli b. Hillel al-Baghdādī. In Judaeo-Arabic, with the address in Arabic. In which the writer discusses a dispatch of money to be used for wheat and clothing, and expresses desire to be joined by one of his sons. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 193, 467, and Goitein's index cards.) Join: Oded Zinger.
description_he: מכתב מהלל בן אלי (פעיל 1066–1108) לבנו אבו אל-חסן עלי בן הלל הבגדאדי: דן במשלוח כסף לחיטה ובגדים ומביע רצון שבנו יצטרף אליו.
